details.question: Write a summary of about 1000 to 1200 words. Only write about the plot and characters of the story.
details.reason: Agent预测严重偏离标准答案，核心人物姓名（如Selina, Farah Dirk, Tamera Israel Lavana）与标准答案（应为Quasimodo, Pierre Gringoire, Claude Frollo）完全不符，主要情节（如Festival of Fools选举、Gringoire的戏剧）缺失，且包含大量标准答案未提及的虚构细节。
